Rediscover your favourite stores.

We're back!
Rediscover Dining, Fashion, Beauty & Entertainment.
JB HI-FI, NOW OPEN
Australia's home of entertainment, with a massive range of TVs, Computers, Tablets, Games & Consoles, Music, Movies, Phones & Appliances, all at JB Hi-Fi.
FIND OUT MORE
SHEIKE, NOW OPEN
Join us in store to explore new arrivals in a stunning brand-new concept store.
FIND OUT MORE
H&M, NOW OPEN
H&M is back with an elevated shopping experience and must-have summer styles. Click to see how we are celebrating.
FIND OUT MORE
SKIN KANDY, NOW OPEN
From children’s ears to helix piercings and everything in between, if you’re ready to get started on your piercing journey, give Skin Kandy a visit.
FIND OUT MORE
SWAROVSKI, NOW OPEN
Expect necklaces, earrings, rings, and everything in-between with exquisite design details that make a statement, day or night.
FIND OUT MORE
MYER, NOW OPEN
Shop incredible offers across fashion, homewares, beauty and more!
FIND OUT MORE
STYLERUNNER, NOW OPEN
Stylerunner is the world's leading digital destination for premium activewear, delivering the latest on-trend styles to the fashion devotees around the globe.
FIND OUT MORE
VILLAGE CINEMAS, NOW OPEN
Whether you’re looking for family fun, a great girls’ night out, or a luxury experience for a special occasion, you can do it all at Village Cinemas.
FIND OUT MORE
GRILL'D, NOW OPEN
Grill'd offers a range of fresh, healthy flame grilled burgers that are made from the highest quality, freshest ingredients – ideal for those who enjoy eating.
FIND OUT MORE
CHIRNSIDE, NOW OPEN
Both our brunch and lunch menu are available all day for your enjoyment, whatever the occasion, a shopping break, a family brunch or a midafternoon graze.
FIND OUT MORE
THE PLAZA TAVERN, NOW OPEN
Whether it's a family lunch, an overdue catch up with your friends or an intimate date night, stop into our 150-seat Bistro today.
FIND OUT MORE
THE SPORTING GLOBE, NOW OPEN
The Sporting Globe sports bars are the place to watch all the biggest sporting events with over 30 HD screens playing LIVE sport from around the globe.
FIND OUT MORE
TIMEZONE, NOW OPEN
Timezone is the best entertainment centre for the whole family. From arcade games to laser tag, there's nowhere better for fun!
FIND OUT MORE
MECCA, NOW OPEN
MECCA deliver on a variety of curated and personalised shopping experiences so that you can explore and enjoy beauty your way.
FIND OUT MORE
BILLINI, NOW OPEN
Billini aims to provide a range of must-have sandals, slides, heels and boots designed to inject style into any wardrobe.
FIND OUT MORE
GLASSONS, NOW OPEN
At Glassons you will be sure to find high-quality fashion that is accessible to everyone, alongside unparalleled customer service.
FIND OUT MORE
ENDOTA, NOW OPEN
Step into a space of calm as you enter our spa and allow our expert therapists to nourish and nurture your mind, body and skin.
FIND OUT MORE
THE CUPCAKE QUEENS, NOW OPEN
Whether you need a tasty gift for a loved one or a little self-indulgence for those special occasions, The Cupcake Queens are here to make you feel like royalty
FIND OUT MORE
SEED, NOW OPEN
Seed Heritage gives a modern take on the classics, set to inspire and to fit into your life at every stage.
FIND OUT MORE
SAN CHURRO, NOW OPEN
Just like the traditional chocolaterias of Spain, San Churro is a destination for friends to come together and share a sweet moment.
FIND OUT MORE

Sign up for our newsletter and be the first to know about new store openings, amazing sales, exciting in-centre events, and so much more.

I agree to the privacy policy and wish to receive Pacific Werribee's newsletter containing the latest news and offers.

We acknowledge and respect the traditional lands and cultures of the Bunurong people of the Kulin Nation, the Traditional Owners and Custodians of the Country on which Pacific Werribee resides, and pay our respects to Elders past and present. We recognise First Nations peoples’ longstanding and ongoing spiritual connections to land, sea, community, and country.
